scripts.check:web: bun run lint:web && bun run format:web
scripts.build:web: bun run build:web-sdk && bun run build:web-demo
scripts.build:python: cd python && uv run maturin develop
scripts.lint:python: cd python && uv run python -m ruff check
scripts.test:python: cd python && uv run cargo test && uv run python -m pytest
scripts.gallery:python: cd python && uv run maturin develop && uv run python scripts/generate_gallery.py
scripts.docs:python: cd python && uv run maturin develop && uv run python scripts/generate_gallery.py && uv run python -m mkdocs serve
scripts.build:docs:python: cd python && uv run maturin develop && uv run python scripts/generate_gallery.py && uv run python -m mkdocs build
scripts.install:web-browsers: cd demo/web && bunx playwright install --with-deps chromium firefox webkit
